comments.author: devon-b
comments.body: Kicking off the week. Three workstreams: (1) schema diff — Priya, by EOD Wed; (2) index strategy review with Jordan — Alex, by Fri; (3) staging dry-run — Jamie, by Thu. Stakeholder review Fri 2pm. Add updates on this ticket.

comments.author: mchen
comments.body: Plan looks good. I'll stay light-touch unless something blocks.

comments.author: devon-b
comments.body: Status check for tomorrow's review — where are we?

comments.body: Schema diff lands today, pairing with Sam in the AM.

comments.author: sam-o
comments.body: Dry-run pushed to Fri AM, but on track for the review.

comments.body: Index strategy locked, doc updated, Jordan signed off.

comments.body: Got pulled into the incident review. Sam is handling this now.

comments.author: sam-o
comments.body: Hitting a snag with the replication lag, might need to push to Friday morning. Maya, can you weigh in on whether that's acceptable given the review?

comments.author: mchen
comments.body: Friday AM is fine if it has to slip, but loop me in earlier next time.

comments.author: sam-o
comments.body: ack, will do. Updating ETA to Fri AM.

comments.author: sam-o
comments.body: Confirmed pairing with Priya at 9am Friday.

comments.body: Looped in Jordan (external consultant) via email. Targeting Friday for sign-off.

comments.author: alex-r
comments.body: Update: dropped composite index in favor of two single-column indexes plus a partial index per Jordan's review. Doc updated: https://docs.acme.com/migrate/indexes-v2
